_meta.author: tahermaxse
_meta.title: Animated Footer
_meta.description:
A sleek, animated footer component inspired by Cluely.com. It replicates the smooth interactions and modern layout of the original design perfect for landing pages, portfolios, or any site that values high-end visual polish.
Built with responsive design in mind and ready to drop into your Next.js + Tailwind projects.

✅ Smooth animation
✅ Fully responsive
✅ Dark mode ready
✅ Pixel-perfect Cluely look
